API¶

Routes¶

FastAPI routes for PilotLog API.

pilotlog.api.routes.format_block_time(minutes: int) → str[source]¶

Format minutes as H:MM.

async pilotlog.api.routes.get_rolling(db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(dependency=get_db, use_cache=True, scope=None)], as_of: date | None = Query(None))[source]¶

Get rolling window totals.

async pilotlog.api.routes.get_routes(db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(dependency=get_db, use_cache=True, scope=None)], date_from: date | None = Query(None), date_to: date | None = Query(None))[source]¶

Get aggregated route data for map visualization.

async pilotlog.api.routes.get_stats(db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(dependency=get_db, use_cache=True, scope=None)], date_from: date | None = Query(None), date_to: date | None = Query(None))[source]¶

Get aggregate career statistics.

async pilotlog.api.routes.health_check()[source]¶

Health check endpoint.

async pilotlog.api.routes.import_csv(db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(dependency=get_db, use_cache=True, scope=None)], file: UploadFile = File(PydanticUndefined))[source]¶

Import a CSV file.

async pilotlog.api.routes.list_airports(db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(dependency=get_db, use_cache=True, scope=None)])[source]¶

Get airport lookup data.

async pilotlog.api.routes.list_flights(db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(dependency=get_db, use_cache=True, scope=None)], date_from: date | None = Query(None), date_to: date | None = Query(None), origin: str | None = Query(None), destination: str | None = Query(None), crew: str | None = Query(None), tail: str | None = Query(None), aircraft_type: str | None = Query(None), limit: int = Query(100), offset: int = Query(0))[source]¶

Query flights with optional filters.

Schemas¶

Pydantic schemas for API request/response models.

class pilotlog.api.schemas.AircraftTypeStats(*, type: str, flights: int, minutes: int)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Statistics for a single aircraft type.

flights: int¶
minutes: int¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

type: str¶
class pilotlog.api.schemas.AirportResponse(*, icao: str, iata: str | None = None, name: str | None = None, city: str | None = None, latitude: float | None = None, longitude: float | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Response model for airport lookup.

city: str | None¶
iata: str | None¶
icao: str¶
latitude: float | None¶
longitude: float | None¶
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

name: str | None¶
class pilotlog.api.schemas.AirportStats(*, icao: str, name: str | None = None, latitude: float | None = None, longitude: float | None = None, departures: int, arrivals: int)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Statistics for a single airport.

arrivals: int¶
departures: int¶
icao: str¶
latitude: float | None¶
longitude: float | None¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

name: str | None¶
class pilotlog.api.schemas.AirportsListResponse(*, airports: list[AirportResponse])[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Response model for list of airports.

airports: list[AirportResponse]¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class pilotlog.api.schemas.DateRange(*, first_flight: str | None = None, last_flight: str | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Date range for statistics.

first_flight: str | None¶
last_flight: str | None¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class pilotlog.api.schemas.FlightResponse(*, id: int, flight_date: str, flight_number: str | None = None, origin: str, destination: str, block_minutes: int, block_formatted: str, tail_number: str | None = None, aircraft_type: str | None = None, crew_name: str | None = None, crew_position: str | None = None, is_deadhead: bool, pic_takeoff: bool, pic_landing: bool)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Response model for a single flight.

aircraft_type: str | None¶
block_formatted: str¶
block_minutes: int¶
crew_name: str | None¶
crew_position: str | None¶
destination: str¶
flight_date: str¶
flight_number: str | None¶
id: int¶
is_deadhead: bool¶
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

origin: str¶
pic_landing: bool¶
pic_takeoff: bool¶
tail_number: str | None¶

An error from import processing.

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

row: int¶

Response model for import operation.
